utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check each in the final plan: 1) health_coverage: Required 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'. The plan lists a rejected provider, €0 monthly, and 'Pending Alternative Provider'—this does not specify actual coverage or costs; thus not fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Required 'home/contents insurance with costs'. The plan includes provider name, monthly cost (€195), and coverage details (€50,000 home contents, fine art & electronics) — this is sufficiently specified. 3) travel_coverage: Required 'travel insurance with costs'. The plan includes provider, monthly cost (€95), and some coverage details — sufficiently specified. 4) additional_services: Required 'any enhancement services with costs'. The plan lists mental health €85/month and concierge €50/month — specified with costs. 5) total_budget: Required 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'. The plan gives a single figure 'current_monthly_insurance_expenditure: €985' and a status; it lacks an annual breakdown and does not itemize the totals or reconcile components. Therefore not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists providers/descriptions that do not exactly match the named options in the ground-truth ratings. Specifically: Health provider is 'Rejected - Negotiation Terminated' (no match), property coverage is 'Existing (ParisHome Luxury Coverage)' (no match to listed property plans), travel coverage is 'Existing (FamilyGlobal Platinum)' (no match to listed travel plans), and additional services list 'WellMind' mental health and 'family_insurance_concierge' which are not in the ground-truth catalog. Therefore, none of the items in the final plan can be mapped to any ground-truth rated options.
